trackedTokens.name: --gin-color-text
trackedTokens.label: Primary text
trackedTokens.description: Main text color for body content, labels, and headings throughout the admin interface

trackedTokens.name: --gin-color-text-light
trackedTokens.label: Secondary text
trackedTokens.description: Muted or secondary text for hints, metadata, timestamps, and less prominent content

trackedTokens.name: --gin-bg-app
trackedTokens.label: App background
trackedTokens.description: Base background color for the entire admin interface; appears behind all content

trackedTokens.name: --gin-bg-layer
trackedTokens.label: Layer background
trackedTokens.description: Background color for cards, panels, modals, and content sections; sits on top of app background

trackedTokens.name: --accent-base
trackedTokens.label: Accent base
trackedTokens.description: Foundation color from which the accent ramp is generated; drives all accent variants (030-900)

trackedTokens.name: --accent-color-500
trackedTokens.label: Accent 500
trackedTokens.description: Mid-tone accent color used for primary interactive elements and highlights

trackedTokens.name: --accent-color-030
trackedTokens.label: Accent 030
trackedTokens.description: Very light accent shade; used for hover states and light backgrounds on accent elements

trackedTokens.name: --gin-color-primary
trackedTokens.label: Primary accent
trackedTokens.description: Main accent color applied to active buttons, links, selected states, and primary actions

trackedTokens.name: --gin-color-primary-light
trackedTokens.label: Primary accent light
trackedTokens.description: Lightened version of primary accent; used for hover and focus states on accent elements

trackedTokens.name: --gin-color-button-text
trackedTokens.label: Primary button text
trackedTokens.description: Text color for primary action buttons; typically white or light text on dark accent

trackedTokens.name: --button-bg-color--primary
trackedTokens.label: Primary button background
trackedTokens.description: Background color for the main "Save", "Create", and other primary action buttons

trackedTokens.name: --button-fg-color--primary
trackedTokens.label: Primary button foreground
trackedTokens.description: Text color specifically for primary buttons; ensures readable contrast on button background

trackedTokens.name: --gin-color-focus
trackedTokens.label: Focus color
trackedTokens.description: Ring or outline color that indicates keyboard focus on interactive elements for accessibility

trackedTokens.name: --gin-color-focus-border
trackedTokens.label: Focus border
trackedTokens.description: Border styling for focused form fields and controls; works with focus color for visibility

trackedTokens.name: --color-focus
trackedTokens.label: Resolved focus token
trackedTokens.description: Computed focus color after resolving all CSS variables and theme settings

trackedTokens.name: --focus-ring
trackedTokens.label: Focus ring effect
trackedTokens.description: Box shadow or outline applied to focused elements to create visible focus indicator

trackedTokens.name: --gin-border-color-form-element
trackedTokens.label: Form border
trackedTokens.description: Border color for input fields, select boxes, textareas, and other form controls

usage.value: color-mix(in lch, lch(from var(--accent-base) calc(l * 20) c h), #000 12%)
usage.snippet: --accent-color-base: color-mix(in lch, lch(from var(--accent-base) calc(l * 20) c h), #000 12%);

usage.value: color-mix(in lch, lch(from var(--accent-base) calc(l * 20) c h), #000 12%)
usage.snippet: --accent-color-base: color-mix(in lch, lch(from var(--accent-base) calc(l * 20) c h), #000 12%);

tokenSummary.name: --accent-base
tokenSummary.label: Accent base
tokenSummary.description: Foundation color from which the accent ramp is generated; drives all accent variants (030-900)

tokenSummary.name: --accent-color-500
tokenSummary.label: Accent 500
tokenSummary.description: Mid-tone accent color used for primary interactive elements and highlights

tokenSummary.name: --accent-color-030
tokenSummary.label: Accent 030
tokenSummary.description: Very light accent shade; used for hover states and light backgrounds on accent elements

tokenSummary.name: --gin-color-primary
tokenSummary.label: Primary accent
tokenSummary.description: Main accent color applied to active buttons, links, selected states, and primary actions

tokenSummary.name: --gin-color-primary-light
tokenSummary.label: Primary accent light
tokenSummary.description: Lightened version of primary accent; used for hover and focus states on accent elements

tokenSummary.name: --gin-color-button-text
tokenSummary.label: Primary button text
tokenSummary.description: Text color for primary action buttons; typically white or light text on dark accent

tokenSummary.name: --button-bg-color--primary
tokenSummary.label: Primary button background
tokenSummary.description: Background color for the main "Save", "Create", and other primary action buttons

tokenSummary.name: --button-fg-color--primary
tokenSummary.label: Primary button foreground
tokenSummary.description: Text color specifically for primary buttons; ensures readable contrast on button background

tokenSummary.name: --gin-color-focus
tokenSummary.label: Focus color
tokenSummary.description: Ring or outline color that indicates keyboard focus on interactive elements for accessibility

tokenSummary.name: --gin-color-focus-border
tokenSummary.label: Focus border
tokenSummary.description: Border styling for focused form fields and controls; works with focus color for visibility

tokenSummary.name: --color-focus
tokenSummary.label: Resolved focus token
tokenSummary.description: Computed focus color after resolving all CSS variables and theme settings

tokenSummary.name: --focus-ring
tokenSummary.label: Focus ring effect
tokenSummary.description: Box shadow or outline applied to focused elements to create visible focus indicator

tokenSummary.name: --gin-border-color-form-element
tokenSummary.label: Form border
tokenSummary.description: Border color for input fields, select boxes, textareas, and other form controls
